mentions.note: Airline caught in endless Iran/oil trading game; no edge on geopolitical outcomes; Cramer warns against speculative positioning.
Reliable earnings generator and volatile airline group; CEO Ed Bastian demonstrated persistent demand; war escalation will hurt 2026 numbers, but quality operator; earnings Wednesday pre-market.
Airlines strong, but TSA debacle raises travel friction concerns; hold current positions pending clarity on trip-cancellation impact from geopolitical events.
CEO Ed Bastian reported strong regular and business travel despite $95 oil; beat bearish consensus on airline fundamentals; real-world performance trumped Wall Street negativity.
Part of 'Big Five Travel' thesis; trades together with other travel stocks; positive structural backdrop.
Airlines putting up terrific numbers; Delta is arguably best-run airline; expect fine quarter from leading operator.
